seo.title: Ladukio Song Lyrics Saithan
seo.description: Full Ladukio songs lyrics, Saithan Songs Lyrics. sharable lyrics snippets, Music: Vijay Antony, Singer(s): Yazin. ladu ladu Ladukio Song Lyrics #Saithan...

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of the song Ladukio?

The song Ladukio is an energetic and peppy track that is perfect for parties and celebrations.

Who is the music director of Saithan?

The music director of Saithan is Vijay Antony.

When was the movie Saithan released?

The movie Saithan was released in the year 2016.

Who sang the song Ladukio?

The song Ladukio was sung by Yazin.
enrichedMetadata.summary: Ladukio is a vibrant and energetic song from the movie Saithan, composed by Vijay Antony and sung by Yazin. The song's lively beats and catchy lyrics make it a perfect fit for party and celebration settings. It captures the essence of excitement and movement, encouraging listeners to let loose and enjoy the rhythm. The song conveys a sense of joy and liveliness, making it an ideal choice for uplifting moods.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Ladukio from the movie Saithan is a high-energy track that perfectly blends Vijay Antony's dynamic music with Yazin's vibrant vocals. This song is a rhythmic celebration that captures the essence of excitement and movement. Dive into the pulsating beats and let the infectious energy of Ladukio take over your senses.
stanzaMeanings: ladu ladu ladu ladukio ladu ladu ladu ladukio ladu lucky-o ladu lucky-o ladukio ladukio
I am getting soaked, you are slowly fading, I am melting, changing, getting lost in you.
You came into me as the life of my life, you mixed into me like a drop of my love.
I will come every day as a shadow in your day, and burn you like fire in your night.
I am getting soaked, you are slowly fading, I am melting, changing, getting lost in you.
ladu ladu ladu ladukio ladu ladu ladu ladukio ladu lucky-o ladu lucky-o ladukio ladukio
When the one I like is near, nothing else matters. Your heart, hands, and head become heavy, and sleep doesn't come.

When someone calls my name, I don't turn around, but when they say your name, I can't stop my neck from turning. My desire is your closeness, nothing else is needed. If you are near, it's enough. Your image runs like a movie on my eyelids. My love, don't leave me.
ladu ladu ladu ladukio ladu ladu ladu ladukio ladu lucky-o ladu lucky-o ladukio ladukio
I am getting soaked, you are slowly fading, I am melting, changing, getting lost in you.
Even when I sleep, your memory doesn't rest. Not for a moment do my eyes leave your face. When living between your eyelashes, there are no worries.
When you are within reach, I don't need even God. In my eyes, in your dreams, we are not separate here.
If you bathe, I feel the wetness too. I want to live without separating from you all night and day. Your love is enough.
